title: Moosend vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend and Flodesk email marketing tools. Pricing, features, and detailed breakdown to help you choose.
intro: Moosend and Flodesk are both solid email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Moosend excels at affordability and automation for small businesses, while Flodesk focuses on stunning visual design for creative professionals. Understanding their core differences will help you pick the right tool for your needs.
choose_a_if: You want to start completely free with no credit card required
Automation workflows and email volume are your top priorities
You're managing e-commerce and need A/B testing capabilities
choose_b_if: Visual design and beautiful templates are essential to your brand
You want unlimited subscribers included at a flat monthly price
You value aesthetics and customer experience in email design

faq.a: It depends on your priorities. Moosend is better for budget-conscious businesses needing powerful automation and unlimited emails, while Flodesk excels for creative professionals who prioritize stunning email design. Moosend has a slight edge in overall versatility and cost-effectiveness for most businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Flodesk?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, offering a free tier for up to 1,000 subscribers and paid plans starting at $9/month. Flodesk has no free tier and starts at $38/month with unlimited subscribers included. For small startups, Moosend's free plan is unbeatable.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists in CSV format and import them into another platform. Be sure to verify that your automation workflows and template designs are compatible before switching.
